releases.author: tmayoff
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Update dependabot.yml by @tmayoff in https://github.com/tmayoff/obsidian-meals/pull/86
* Bump oven-sh/setup-bun from 1 to 2 by @dependabot in https://github.com/tmayoff/obsidian-meals/pull/87
* Bump softprops/action-gh-release from 1 to 2 by @dependabot in https://github.com/tmayoff/obsidian-meals/pull/88
* Bump the prod-dependencies group with 2 updates by @dependabot in https://github.com/tmayoff/obsidian-meals/pull/90
* Bump actions/checkout from 3 to 4 by @dependabot in https://github.com/tmayoff/obsidian-meals/pull/89
* Bump the dev-dependencies group with 2 updates by @dependabot in https://github.com/tmayoff/obsidian-meals/pull/91
* Update README.md by @tmayoff in https://github.com/tmayoff/obsidian-meals/pull/92
* Add recipe-rs for recipe scraping from sites by @tmayoff in https://github.com/tmayoff/obsidian-meals/pull/83
* Bumped parse-ingredient by @tmayoff in https://github.com/tmayoff/obsidian-meals/pull/93
* Create release-please.yml by @tmayoff in https://github.com/tmayoff/obsidian-meals/pull/94
* feat: update release-please to upload artifacts by @tmayoff in https://github.com/tmayoff/obsidian-meals/pull/95
* chore(main): release 0.1.0 by @tmayoff in https://github.com/tmayoff/obsidian-meals/pull/96
* Update manifest.json by @tmayoff in https://github.com/tmayoff/obsidian-meals/pull/97
* Update manifest.json by @tmayoff in https://github.com/tmayoff/obsidian-meals/pull/99
* fix: Load inlined wasm by @tmayoff in https://github.com/tmayoff/obsidian-meals/pull/100
* chore: Bump version in manifest.json by @tmayoff in https://github.com/tmayoff/obsidian-meals/pull/101


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tmayoff/obsidian-meals/compare/0.0.12...0.1.1

releases.author: tmayoff
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Add the currently open recipe to the shopping list by @tmayoff in https://github.com/tmayoff/obsidian-meals/pull/68
* Linting by @tmayoff in https://github.com/tmayoff/obsidian-meals/pull/69
* Update dependabot.yml by @tmayoff in https://github.com/tmayoff/obsidian-meals/pull/75
* Bump svelte-check from 3.6.4 to 3.8.4 by @dependabot in https://github.com/tmayoff/obsidian-meals/pull/74
* Bump tailwindcss from 3.4.1 to 3.4.4 by @dependabot in https://github.com/tmayoff/obsidian-meals/pull/70
* Bump tslib from 2.6.2 to 2.6.3 by @dependabot in https://github.com/tmayoff/obsidian-meals/pull/71
* Bump unocss from 0.57.7 to 0.61.0 by @dependabot in https://github.com/tmayoff/obsidian-meals/pull/72
* Bump the dev-dependencies group across 1 directory with 5 updates by @dependabot in https://github.com/tmayoff/obsidian-meals/pull/77
* Linted by @tmayoff in https://github.com/tmayoff/obsidian-meals/pull/78
* Fix plugin loading by @tmayoff in https://github.com/tmayoff/obsidian-meals/pull/80
* Some even more advanced ingredient parsing  by @tmayoff in https://github.com/tmayoff/obsidian-meals/pull/79
* Update README.md by @tmayoff in https://github.com/tmayoff/obsidian-meals/pull/82
* Create a release by @tmayoff in https://github.com/tmayoff/obsidian-meals/pull/84


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tmayoff/obsidian-meals/compare/0.0.11...0.0.12

releases.author: tmayoff
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Bump vite from 4.5.2 to 4.5.3 by @dependabot in https://github.com/tmayoff/obsidian-meals/pull/54
* Shopping list formatting by @tmayoff in https://github.com/tmayoff/obsidian-meals/pull/56
* Fix weird modal with the search modal by @tmayoff in https://github.com/tmayoff/obsidian-meals/pull/57
* Bump bun-types from 1.0.29 to 1.1.17 by @dependabot in https://github.com/tmayoff/obsidian-meals/pull/58
* Bump @unocss/extractor-svelte from 0.57.7 to 0.61.0 by @dependabot in https://github.com/tmayoff/obsidian-meals/pull/59
